Cmd_load.notes: Covered through AgdaSession, fixture-matrix integration, and MCP harness tests.

Cmd_load_no_metas.notes: Covered through strict-load fixture expectations and MCP harness tests.

Cmd_goal_type_context.notes: Exercised through direct goal queries and MCP harness goal inspection tests.

Cmd_goal_type.notes: Exposed via exact goal-only tool and covered by unit/property decoding tests.

Cmd_metas.notes: Used in load reconciliation and strict completeness checks.

Cmd_search_about_toplevel.notes: Covered by decoder, property tests, Agda-backed search fixtures, and MCP harness tests.

Cmd_autoOne.notes: Covered by live proof-action integration tests including unsolved-goal cases.

Cmd_make_case.notes: Covered by live analysis/case-split fixture path.

Cmd_context.notes: Covered by expression-parity fixtures and MCP harness context queries.

Cmd_infer.notes: Covered by expression-display decoder tests, expression-parity fixtures, and MCP harness infer queries.

Cmd_infer_toplevel.notes: Covered by expression-display decoder tests, expression-parity fixtures, and MCP harness infer queries.

Cmd_goal_type_context_infer.notes: Covered by expression-parity fixtures for goal/context/type inference.

Cmd_goal_type_context_check.notes: Covered by expression-parity fixtures for goal/context/type checking.

Cmd_compute.notes: Covered by expression-display decoder tests, expression-parity fixtures, and MCP harness compute queries.

Cmd_compute_toplevel.notes: Covered by expression-display decoder tests, expression-parity fixtures, and MCP harness compute queries.
